verses.1: Qul oohiya ilayya annahu istamaAAa nafarun mina aljinni faqaloo inna samiAAna quranan AAajaban
verses.2: Yahdee ila alrrushdi faamanna bihi walan nushrika birabbina ahadan
verses.3: Waannahu taAAala jaddu rabbina ma ittakhatha sahibatan wala waladan
verses.4: Waannahu kana yaqoolu safeehuna AAala Allahi shatatan
verses.5: Waanna thananna an lan taqoola alinsu waaljinnu AAala Allahi kathiban
verses.6: Waannahu kana rijalun mina alinsi yaAAoothoona birijalin mina aljinni fazadoohum rahaqan
verses.7: Waannahum thannoo kama thanantum an lan yabAAatha Allahu ahadan
verses.8: Waanna lamasna alssamaa fawajadnaha muliat harasan shadeedan washuhuban
verses.9: Waanna kunna naqAAudu minha maqaAAida lilssamAAi faman yastamiAAi alana yajid lahu shihaban rasadan
verses.10: Waanna la nadree asharrun oreeda biman fee alardi am arada bihim rabbuhum rashadan
verses.11: Waanna minna alssalihoona waminna doona thalika kunna taraiqa qidadan
verses.12: Wanna thananna an lan nuAAjiza Allaha fee alardi walan nuAAjizahu haraban
verses.13: Waanna lamma samiAAna alhuda amanna bihi faman yumin birabbihi fala yakhafu bakhsan wala rahaqan
verses.14: Waanna minna almuslimoona waminna alqasitoona faman aslama faolaika taharraw rashadan
verses.16: Waallawi istaqamoo AAala alttareeqati laasqaynahum maan ghadaqan
verses.17: Linaftinahum feehi waman yuAArid AAan thikri rabbihi yaslukhu AAathaban saAAadan
verses.18: Waanna almasajida lillahi fala tadAAoo maAAa Allahi ahadan
verses.19: Waannahu lamma qama AAabdu Allahi yadAAoohu kadoo yakoonoona AAalayhi libadan
verses.20: Qul innama adAAoo rabbee wala oshriku bihi ahadan
verses.21: Qul innee la amliku lakum darran wala rashadan
verses.22: Qul innee lan yujeeranee mina Allahi ahadun walan ajida min doonihi multahadan
verses.23: Illa balaghan mina Allahi warisalatihi waman yaAAsi Allaha warasoolahu fainna lahu nara jahannama khalideena feeha abadan
verses.24: Hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona fasayaAAlamoona man adAAafu nasiran waaqallu AAadadan
verses.25: Qul in adree aqareebun ma tooAAadoona am yajAAalu lahu rabbee amadan
verses.26: AAalimu alghaybi fala yuthhiru AAala ghaybihi ahadan
verses.27: Illa mani irtada min rasoolin fainnahu yasluku min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi rasadan
verses.28: LiyaAAlama an qad ablaghoo risalati rabbihim waahata bima ladayhim waahsa kulla shayin AAadadan
